title: Categories Feature Root
description: Non-runnable container coordinating all child beads for the categories browsing feature. No code changes live here; all implementation, testing, documentation, and review work is expressed in child beads.
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild test exits 0 including new category tests
Sources tab shows a Categories section ordered by sort_order between the Feeds and Sources sections
Tapping a category opens ArticleListView filtered to that category on the first tap
Freshness subtitle activates when API provides last_activity/has_priority; rows show only name when fields absent
Pull-to-refresh refreshes both sources and categories
Categories fetch failure does not blank the tab; load-once scroll preservation maintained
